---
title: "Apple Music Turns 10"
description: "10 years ago today, Apple Music went live."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-06-30"
categories: [Apple, Apple Music, history, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Apple Music 10th Anniversary, Los Angeles studio. Photo: Apple. ([Source](https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2025/06/apple-music-celebrates-10-years-with-the-launch-of-a-new-global-hub-for-artists/))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

10 years ago today, Apple Music went live [[1]](#ref-1).

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "Apple Music celebrates 10 years with the launch of a new global hub for artists." *Apple Newsroom*, June 2025. <https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2025/06/apple-music-celebrates-10-years-with-the-launch-of-a-new-global-hub-for-artists/>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_apple-music-celebrates-10-years-with-the-activity-7345469209180610560-SfzC).*
